title: Signer
description: A signer recipient who must sign the envelope documents.

recipientId.description: Unique identifier for the recipient. Assigned by the sender.

name.description: The full legal name of the signer.

email.description: The email address of the signer.

routingOrder.description: The routing order of the signer. Lower numbers are processed first. Recipients with the same routing order sign in parallel.

roleName.description: The role name associated with the signer, used with templates.

clientUserId.description: The client user ID for embedded signing. When set, the recipient is an embedded signer and must sign through your application using a generated signing URL.

signedDateTime.description: The date and time the signer signed.

deliveredDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was delivered to the signer.

declinedDateTime.description: The date and time the signer declined.

identityVerification.description: Identity verification settings for this recipient.

accessCode.description: An access code the recipient must enter to access the envelope.

requireIdLookup.description: Whether ID lookup authentication is required.

note.description: A private note to the signer from the sender.
